property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an opponent's non-combat/ non-drill card in play. You now control the chosen card. When the chosen card leaves play, it is shuffled into your opponent's life deck. If Bulma is your MP, you may use this card when entering combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage. This card stays in play to be used 1 more time this combat. For every one of your "Attacker Attacks" phases that this card stays in play, it does +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Stops an energy attack. If you declared a tokui-waza, you may have your MP lose 0 to 8 power stages. For every 2 power stages lost this way, the next attack you perform this combat does +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful, you may remove a Dragon Ball you control from the game to use its power. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Once per combat when 1 of your Blue style attacks is stopped, you may discard a card from your hand to put the stopped attack back into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Your MP's PUR is +3. The first Blue style attack you perform each combat does +X life cards of damage, where X= your MP's PUR.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 1 life card of damage. This attack does +X life cards of damage, where X= your Main Personality's PUR. Until the end of your next turn, your Main Personality gains +2 PUR.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. If you declared a tokui-waza, Blue Copycat Drill's power box becomes a copy of your opponent's Mastery's power box except treat any style words as if they said "Blue" instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 8 power stages of damage. Look at the top 5 cards of your life deck. You may put all of them on the top or bottom in any order.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. Look at the top 5 cards of your life deck or discard pile. You may place them on the top and/or bottom of your life deck or discard pile, respectively, in any order. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Empower 2. If successful, choose a Namekian style card in your discard pile and place it on the top or bottom of your life deck or discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your deck. Energy attack doing 1 life cad of damage. Costs 0 power stages to perform. Damage from this attack cannot be modified, changed, or prevented. This attack stays on the table to be used 3 more times this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Focused energy attack. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If this is the 1st attack you perform in combat, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this combat. If successful, set your MP to its highest power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. You may discard an Orange non-combat card you have in play to search your life deck for an Orange energy combat card other than "Orange Cocky Deflection" and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat, increase the printed endurance on your Orange style cards by 1. For the remainder of combat, you may use endurance even if damage cannot be prevented.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Energy attack. You may remove 5 Orange style cards in your discard pile from the game or discard 5 cards from the top of your life deck to advance a personality level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. Your opponent chooses 2 cards in their sensei deck to remove from the game. This attack does an additional +X power stages of damage, where X= the number of empty slots in your opponent's sensei deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. Your opponent cannot perform a physical attack in their next "Attacker Attacks" phase. If successful, your opponent cannot perform a physical attack in their next 2 "Attacker Attacks" phases instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card can be played even if a card effect would prevent you from playing or performing it.) Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If you declared a tokui-waza, end all floating effects that last for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, reveal cards from the top of your life deck until you reveal a card with "Energy" in the title and place it into your hand, then place the remaining cards on the bottom of your life deck in a random order. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Focused physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a tokui-waza, for the remainder of combat you may copy the effect of a drill you control.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat whenever your opponent stops an attack, their Main Personality loses 2 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Stops a physical attack. You may remove any number of Saiyan Heritage Only cards in your discard pile from the game. For each card removed this way you may remove 1 card in your opponent's discard pile from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Saiyan Heritage only. Remove a Saiyan Heritage Only card in your discard pile from the game to raise your anger 1 level. You may repeat this effect any number of times.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If in either your last Attacker Attacks phase or Defender Defends phase, you used a card with Android in the title you may raise your anger 2 levels or gain 5 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. You may search your life deck for a level 1 ally and place it into play at 3 power stages above 0. If used by Majin Babidi, you may search for an ally of any level instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: While this card is in play, your cards named "The Potara Earrings" and "The Fusion Dance" cannot leave play via your opponent's card effects. When entering combat, you may search your life deck for "The Potara Earrings" or "The Fusion Dance" and place it into play. For the remainder of the game, when a Fused Personality leaves play, it is returned to the Sensei Deck instead of remove from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If your Main Personality is above level 1, you may have them lose a personality level to have this cad stay on the table to be used one more time this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your opponent would use a card effect that discards a card from your hand or shuffles them into your life deck, you may discard this card to stop that effect and use this card's secondary effects.) Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage. Until the end of the turn, any cards in your hand, discard pile, or life deck cannot be discarded, removed, or put into your life deck by your opponent's non-damage card effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Villains only. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, or used by Hercule, shuffle up to 5 Tuff Enuff only cards in your discard pile into your life deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Gain X power stages where X= your PUR. For the remainder of combat, your attacks gain "if stopped, raise your anger 1 level."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, cards with "Smackdown" in the title do not count against your tokui-waza.) Constant Combat Power: Hercule can play and use "Villains only" cards. Attacks you perform with Tuff Enuff Only cards deal +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Launch is your MP you cannot win by MPPV for the remainder of the game, and at the end of combat advance a personality level.) Prevent all damage from an attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Launch is your MP, at the end of combat advance a personality level.) Energy attack. The next attack you perform this combat with Blast, Shot, Missile, or Cannon in the title does +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Launch is your MP, at the end of combat advance a personality level.) Power: Stops a physical or energy attack. You may search your life deck for a card with Blast, Shot, Missile, or Cannon in the title and discard it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Launch is your MP, at the end of combat, lower your MP to level 1.) Constant Combat Power: All of your attacks deal +2 life cards of damage. Your attacks with Blast, Shot, Missile or Cannon in the title gain Transform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: At the end of the discard step, if you have no cards in your hand you may draw a card. The first time you pass each combat, gain 2 anger. If your opponent is Saiyan Heritage gain 3 anger instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: In your next Attacker Attacks phase perform a physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If your opponent's MP is Saiyan Heritage this attack doing 10 power stages of damage instead. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: In your next Attacker Attacks phase perform an energy attack doing 10 life cards of damage or pass. If your opponent's MP is Saiyan Heritage this attack costs 0 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: In your next Attacker Attacks phase perform a physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. In your following Attacker Attacks phase this combat, peform an energy attack doing 10 life cards of damage or pass. If your opponent's MP is Saiyan Heritage, this attack costs 0 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. If used by Vegeta, raise your anger 2 levels. If Successful, and you have not used the effect of Vegeta's Big Bang Attack to search your life deck this combat, search your life deck for a Vegeta named physical or energy combat card, other than Vegeta's Big Bang Attack and place it into your hand.
